source.authority: Danish Tax Agency and Ministry of Taxation
source.scope: Official-source-backed Denmark calendar-year 2026 adult resident employment income below the middle-tax threshold, including AM contribution, bottom tax and caller-confirmed municipal tax.

DK.notes: Calendar-year 2026 adult resident employment-income calculation below the DKK 641,200 after-AM middle-tax threshold, with 8% AM contribution, 12.01% bottom tax, DKK 54,100 personal allowance and caller-confirmed municipal taxable income and rate.

register.coverageSummary: 2026 adult resident employment income below the middle-tax threshold, including AM contribution, bottom tax and caller-confirmed municipal tax.
